  "reasoning": "The state's power surged due to victory in the War of the Pacific and vast new nitrate revenues, funding military and bureaucratic expansion. Simultaneously, society's power weakened as state-led secularization dismantled the Church's influence, an effect only partially offset by expanded male suffrage.",
